title: Secure first confirmed adoption partner
context: Per-task delivery need stays unproven (verifiedNeed:false) until a named commons/repo/advocacy maintainer agrees to adopt dictionaries. This task secures that first confirmed partner and documents the contribution mechanism, after which the relevant tasks flip to verifiedNeed:true.
objective: Secure a first confirmed adoption partner and document the contribution mechanism, enabling verifiedNeed:true on that partner's tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: A named commons/repo/advocacy maintainer confirms they will review and adopt dictionaries.
Contribution mechanism documented (PR vs. commons docs process vs. Zenodo companion).
Tasks for that partner updated to verifiedNeed:true with requestor set.
